features.summary: Added deterministic GET /api/answer endpoint with grounded draft and not_found responses.
Fixed server integration test lifecycle so the full test suite completes cleanly.
Added normalized ingestion for Markdown and TXT, preserved PDF via adapter, and documented DOCX dependency requirement.
Replaced DOCX ingestion stub with mammoth-based plain-text extraction into normalized sections.
Implemented provider-agnostic embedding chunk planning, deterministic identity, repository boundary, idempotent indexing, vector validation, failure handling, and provenance preservation.
Implemented deterministic hybrid retrieval ranking across phrase, keyword, and vector candidates while preserving evidence-first answer behavior.
Integrated hybrid retrieval into evidence and API flows while preserving keyword, phrase, and deterministic answer behavior.
Added pgvector schema, production repository adapter, vector candidate mapping, dimension validation, and offline tests.
Added query embedding boundary and optional vector repository wiring for hybrid evidence with graceful degradation and offline tests.
Added HTTP query embedding provider, configuration-safe factory, transport injection, stable error mapping, and offline tests.
Define runtime composition for query embedding provider, pgvector repository, and hybrid evidence dependencies with safe fallback.
